Returns jemalloc statistics in a single row with a single column. Equivalent to SYSTEM JEMALLOC STATS command.

Columns:

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `stats` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — JEMalloc statistics output from malloc_stats_print.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
